description: This file provides environment configuration management for a React Single Page Application (SPA). It sources configuration variables from environment variables following the CRA (Create React App) convention, parses JSON feature flags, and constructs relevant URLs for API, WebSocket, and frontend. The core function 'getEnv' returns a normalized environment configuration object.

methods.name: parseJson
methods.description: Parses a JSON string value, returning a fallback value if parsing fails or if value is falsy.

methods.name: getEnv()
methods.description: Returns a normalized environment configuration object with URLs, environment mode, log level, feature flags, and other environment-specific settings.
